description: Market leader in precision cutting, grinding, and polishing equipment for semiconductor manufacturing. Holds approximately 70% market share in slicing and dicing machines.

_externalRelationships.notes: 70%+ market share in dicing saws and grinders. DISCO + Tokyo Seimitsu = 90% of global dicing market.

_metadata.notes: 52-week range: 22,640-76,890 JPY. Dividend yield: 0.57%. 12 analysts rate Buy. Dominates niche for decades.
